description_long: This is a vintage-style record player console with a rectangular wooden cabinet featuring a rich, dark wood grain finish and geometric black accents on the front and side panels. The upper section has a hinged lid that is open, revealing the turntable platter, tonearm, and a set of control knobs and switches. The front lower section is covered with a light-colored, textured speaker grille, and the legs are short and tapered, giving the unit a mid-century modern appearance. The control panel is set into the top surface next to the platter, with clearly marked buttons and dials. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of wood, metal, and plastic components. The branding "NATIONAL" is visible on the front, suggesting a classic or retro design.
description: A vintage wooden record player console with a hinged lid, exposed turntable, control panel, and a textured speaker grille on the front. The design features dark wood, black geometric accents, and mid-century modern legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, turntable platter, control panel, and the light-colored speaker grille with the 'NATIONAL' branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the open lid, and a partial view of the turntable and controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the geometric black and wood pattern, with no visible controls or speaker grille.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open lid, turntable platter, and control panel from a different angle.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and located on the left side under the open lid, the platter is circular, flat, and appears to be made of metal or plastic with a light gray color. It is medium-sized relative to the console, with a smooth finish and no visible grooves or patterns.
attribute_tonearm: Present, positioned to the right of the platter, the tonearm is straight, slender, and appears to be made of metal or plastic with a light color. It is resting in its holder and has a simple, functional design.
attribute_control_knobs: Several control knobs and switches are present on the top surface next to the platter. They are cylindrical, made of plastic or metal, and are light-colored with visible labels and markings. The layout is organized, with buttons and sliders for various functions.
attribute_dust_cover: Present as a hinged wooden lid that is currently open. The lid matches the dark wood finish of the cabinet and is attached with hinges at the back. It is opaque and does not appear to be removable.
